programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of two couples in the village of Monks Barton.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Sinister secrets are revealed when a player is found murdered at the Whiteoaks Golf Club.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Henry Hodgson's newly discovered masterpiece is auctioned hours after its owner is killed.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI Barnaby's secret past is revealed when a former agent is murdered after a cricket match.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: As Magnum, Higgins and TC try to pull one over on a Customs agent to get Higgins a green card, armed gunmen suddenly storm the federal building and start taking hostages.

programme.title: I, Frankenstein
programme.desc: Dr. Frankenstein's creature finds himself in the middle of a war, holding the key that could destroy humankind

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter is all that stands between humanity and the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Caught between the worlds of the supernatural and human, Hellboy battles an ancient sorceress bent on revenge.

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian
programme.desc: A warrior sets off to get his revenge on the evil warlord who attacked his village and murdered his father.

programme.title: American Yakuza
programme.desc: Viggo Mortensen ("Green Book") stars as an undercover FBI agent who has risen through the ranks of the Yakuza and now finds himself caught in a war between the Yakuza, the mob and the FBI.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a tough cop who's dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers. Also featuring Paddy Considine and Aidan Gillen.

programme.title: Elephant White
programme.desc: An assassin is hired by a businessman to avenge the murder of his daughter by white slave traders in Thailand.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: In Hell
programme.desc: Kyle LeBlanc is an honorable citizen who winds up incarcerated in Russia after he takes revenge on the man who murdered his wife, resulting in the killer's death. Unfortunately for Kyle, he is assigned to a prison that is renowned for its violence. Controlled by a corrupt and sadistic warden, the facility regularly holds brutal fights between inmates. In order to survive in the prison, Kyle must participate in the battles, even as he attempts to retain his humanity.

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: A Gelfling named Jen who sets out to restore balance to his world by finding a missing shard of a magical crystal

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah is given thirteen hours to solve a labyrinth and rescue her baby brother.

programme.title: The Marksman
programme.desc: A rancher on the Arizona border becomes the unlikely defender of a young Mexican boy desperately fleeing the cartel assassins who've pursued him into the U.S.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Wanting to lead an honest life, a notorious bank robber turns himself in.

programme.title: Songs In Ordinary Time
programme.desc: A struggling mother takes in a mysterious stranger. Is she opening her heart to love...or harboring a criminal.

programme.title: Surrender, Dorothy
programme.desc: After a young woman dies in a tragic car accident, her mother (Diane Keaton) copes with the loss by visiting her daughter's friends when they fail to attend the funeral.

programme.title: Facing The Giants
programme.desc: A losing coach with an underdog football team faces their giants of fear and failure on and off the field to surprising results.

programme.title: Final Descent
programme.desc: An airliner collides with a light plane just after takeoff, causing its elevators to jam in the full climb position.

programme.title: The Mouse That Roared
programme.desc: An outlandish, sidesplitting tale of the fortunes of the Duchy of Grand Fenwick.

programme.title: The Fuller Brush Girl
programme.desc: A scatterbrained door-to-door cosmetics saleswoman and her bumbling file clerk fiancé become prime suspects in a murder.

programme.title: Middle Of The Night
programme.desc: March played a 53-year old widowed clothing manufacturer who happens to fall in love with one of his employees, 30 years his junior. As the romance blossoms and March experiences happiness for the first time in years, his family resents the intrusion of the young newcomer and they do their best to end the romance.

programme.title: Divorce American Style
programme.desc: About a nouveau-riche Los Angeles couple who, after 17 years of marriage, decide to call it quits.

programme.title: The Company
programme.desc: A young ballet dancer is poised to become the principal performer in a group of ballet dancers.

programme.title: The Exorcist III (Theatrical Cut)
programme.desc: A police Lieutenant uncovers more than he bargained for as his investigation of a series of murders, which have all the hallmarks of the deceased Gemini serial killer, leads him to question the patients of a psychiatric ward.

programme.title: Standing Up, Falling Down
programme.desc: After four years of chasing his stand-up comedy dream in Los Angeles, 34-year-old Scott Rollins (Ben Schwartz, Parks And Recreation) has crashed and burned. Left with little money and a fledging "career," Scott has no choice but to regroup, lick his wounds, and return to his parents' house in Long Island. While trying to figure out what to do next, he pines after his ex, Becky (Eloise Mumford), a successful photographer who has since married a former mutual friend. On a night out at a local bar, Scott strikes up an unlikely friendship with a very flawed, but very charming dermatologist, Marty (Billy Crystal, When Harry Met Sally...), who has a few regrets of his own. Marty and Scott help each other find the courage to face the failures in their lives and take stock in what their futures could bring.

programme.title: Suburbia
programme.desc: Suburbia is director Penelope Spheeris's study of the Los Angeles punk rock scene in the early 1980s. Evan and his younger brother leave their broken home in an attempt to escape their alcoholic mother. They find family in a group of punks who live as squatters in an abandoned shack by the side of the highway

programme.title: Cell
programme.desc: When a cell phone signal causes apocalyptic chaos, an artist is determined to reunite with his young son.

programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: After a plane crash, a toxic virus begins to spread. A couple is quarantined but must fight for survival.

programme.title: Pandorum
programme.desc: Two crew members wake up on an abandoned spacecraft with no idea who they are, and discover they're not alone.

programme.title: Daybreakers
programme.desc: As human blood becomes more scarce, vampires must search for new ways to satisfy their craving.

programme.title: Drive Angry 3D
programme.desc: John's daughter was murdered, so he escapes hell to rescue his granddaughter, with an FBI agent on his heels.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 2
programme.desc: A new victim has been chosen to face off against a ravenous shark in a Texas lake.

programme.title: Andromeda: 1883
programme.desc: Space marine Casey Reynolds travels into the past to stop a killer android bent on wiping out the one person crucial to saving the human race.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Joe Baby
programme.desc: A money collector for a private investigator is hired to track down 10 million dollars stolen in a dodgy real estate deal, opening a complex can of worms.

programme.title: Furie
programme.desc: A former gang leader battles human traffickers to save her kidnapped daughter.

programme.title: Emergency Declaration
programme.desc: While investigating a terrorist threat that goes online, Korean authorities discover that a suspect has recently boarded a flight bound for the United States. When a healthy passenger on the same plane suddenly dies, panic erupts both in-flight and on the ground. With steadily decreasing fuel and international refusals to offer aid, the captain and crew take unprecedented emergency measures to save the lives of all on board.

programme.title: Code of the Assassins
programme.desc: Trained by the best, a young assassin is assigned his first mission while secretly investigating the cause of his family's massacre years ago. Failing to complete his mission, he becomes a fugitive hunted by the government, rival assassin groups and other shadowy killers.

programme.title: Believer
programme.desc: A low-level drug dealer joins forces with an ambitious cop to bring down a psychotic cartel kingpin.

programme.title: Abducted Off the Street: The Carlesha Gaither Story
programme.desc: Carlesha was walking home when she is forced into a car at knifepoint.

programme.title: Abducted By My Teacher: The Elizabeth Thomas Story
programme.desc: 15-year-old Elizabeth Thomas was groomed by married teacher Tad Cummins.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The College Admissions Scandal with Gretchen Carlson
programme.desc: The rich and famous abusing their privilege to get their kids into college

programme.title: Cleveland Abduction
programme.desc: The true story of Michelle Knight, a 21-year-old single mom who was abducted.

programme.title: Abducted Off the Street: The Carlesha Gaither Story
programme.desc: Carlesha was walking home when she is forced into a car at knifepoint.

programme.title: Abducted By My Teacher: The Elizabeth Thomas Story
programme.desc: 15-year-old Elizabeth Thomas was groomed by married teacher Tad Cummins.

programme.title: The Bouquet
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.title: Love on Your Doorstep
programme.desc: A TV host profiles a local florist’s long-running flower competition in order to land her own show.

programme.title: Love on Retreat
programme.desc: Sparks fly between Jenny and Nate at a corporate retreat, despite him being her boss’s brother.

programme.title: Love at First Like
programme.desc: A journalist covering the Don Juan of dating apps ends up finding there's more than meets the eye.

programme.title: My Daddy is In Heaven
programme.desc: Becca and Adam Smith along with their 5-year-old daughter Acie are a perfect family until a tragedy strikes

programme.title: The Climb
programme.desc: The breath-taking story of two men ... one with a courageous heart who seeks God; the other with an independent spirit who relies on his own strength.

programme.title: Hard Lesson
programme.desc: A Jewish parole officer, Jeff Solomon White, struggles in his new role as a reading teacher for illiterate teens at a New York high school. Raised by African American parents, White sees the situation differently and is motivated to fight for his students, who face an almost certain life of crime and prison.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: Murder Without Motive
programme.desc: Edmund Perry has everything going for him after he graduates with a scholarship to attend Stanford. With his dedication paying off, an encounter with a police officer senselessly ends his life.

programme.title: American Honey
programme.desc: Star (Sasha Lane), an adolescent girl from a troubled home, runs away with a traveling sales crew that drives across the American Midwest selling subscriptions door-to-door. Finding her feet in this gang of teenagers, one of whom is Jake (Shia LaBeouf), she soon gets into the group's lifestyle of hard-partying nights, law-bending days and young love.

programme.title: The Good Sister
programme.desc: Raven moves in with her sister Devin and her husband in Atlanta, where she begins to dig her claws into Devin’s life and home, and seducing her husband. Devin must make a choice that could be deadly to save her own life and happiness.

programme.title: Shuttered Secrets
programme.desc: When Trey’s ex-girlfriend, Jada, unexpectedly shows up to his studio, she accuses him of dark secrets and being involved in a missing persons case. Their reunion quickly spirals into psychological warfare and violence. As the night goes on, the line between predator and victim blurs when other mysterious figures arrive and everything must be questioned.

programme.title: Trouble
programme.desc: As Draven faces financial ruin and a serious illness, her marriage to Adam frays. She reconnects with Ceceilius, a wealthy ex, finding comfort in his stability. But as their romance blossoms, Adam’s jealousy spirals into a dangerous obsession, fueled by terrifying dreams and a mysterious woman, Robin. With a wedding on the horizon and secrets unraveling, love and betrayal collide, leading to a shocking conclusion where nothing is as it seems.

programme.title: Tilt
programme.desc: When a local drug dealer is arrested and put in jail, he asks his daughter Diamond to run his operation. Diamond takes control of the empire, however it doesn’t sit well with members of the crew. Diamond gets word, from her trusted sources, that two members of the crew are plotting to overthrow her Father’s drug empire. Diamond must get rid of the two disloyal members of the crew before they take control of the operation.

programme.title: CODE
programme.desc: Dallas artist MALIK SCHAEFER, also known as CODE, is a rising star in the underground rap scene. Although his checkered past has led him down the wrong road at times, with the help of his best friend, STYLES, Malik is back on the fast-track to success. That is, until he reconnects with the dangerous love of his life, SOPHIA ORTEGA, who threatens to destroy it all. Malik must decide to either follow his heart or live by the code that has served him well for many years: family over everything.

programme.title: Aquarium of the Dead
programme.desc: When an accident turns animals in an aquarium to zombies, the employees have no choice but to fight back.

programme.title: Alien Predator
programme.desc: A black ops team sent to investigate the crash of an unidentified aircraft is hunted by the former occupants.

programme.title: Triassic World
programme.desc: Dinosaurs used to grow human organs for transplants escape. The scientists that created them must fight back.

programme.title: Abraham Lincoln vs Zombies
programme.desc: As the Civil War rages, President Lincoln undertakes a more daunting task: Destroying the Confederate Undead.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Treasure
programme.desc: A treasure hunter is forced into a deadly race to uncover a Christian relic and history’s greatest treasure.

programme.title: Nightbreed: The Director's Cut (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Boone may be a troubled young man, but his troubles are just beginning. Set up as the fall guy in a string of slasher murders, he decides he'll hide by crossing the threshold that separates us from them and sneak into the forbidden subterranean realm of Midian. Boone will live among the monsters. Includes over 40 minutes of new footage, all mastered in high definition from the original camera negative!

programme.title: The Ward
programme.desc: In 1966, in North Bend, Oregon, the runaway the police capture Kristen after burning down a farmhouse and is locked in the North Bend Psychiatric Hospital. Kristen is introduced to Dr. Gerald Stringer, who uses experimental therapy. Then she meets the inmates Emily, Sarah, Zoey, and Iris and the tough nurse Lundt. During the night and in the shower later, Kristen sees the ghost of a woman and she learns that she is Alice Leigh Hudson, a mysterious wicked intern that has disappeared. When Iris is ready to go home, she is attacked by the ghost of Alice in the basement and murdered. She vanishes and the inmates decide to seek Iris out. Then Sarah is abducted by Alice and killed; the next one is Emily. Meanwhile, Kristen escapes from her room and meets Zoey, expecting to protect her. However, Alice kidnaps Zoey and Kristen runs to Dr. Stringer's office. She snoops his desk and finds a report with the truth about Alice.

programme.title: Two Evil Eyes
programme.desc: In George Romero's The Facts In The Case Of Mr. Valdemar, a conniving wife and her lover use a hypnotic trance to embezzle a fortune from her dying husband, only to receive some chilling surprises from beyond the grave. Then in Dario Argento's The Black Cat, a deranged crime scene photographer is driven to brutal acts of madness and murder by his girlfriend's new pet.

programme.title: Nightbreed: The Director's Cut (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Boone may be a troubled young man, but his troubles are just beginning. Set up as the fall guy in a string of slasher murders, he decides he'll hide by crossing the threshold that separates us from them and sneak into the forbidden subterranean realm of Midian. Boone will live among the monsters. Includes over 40 minutes of new footage, all mastered in high definition from the original camera negative!

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Richard and Della are invited to a cabin owned by their wealthy former best man, Alan. Richard slowly becomes convinced that Della is having an affair with Alan. After murdering the two of them, Richard realizes just how wrong he was.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Stacy and Devlin fall in love. Stacy's fiancée, Mitch sets out to kill Devlin. However, Mitch soon gets a nasty surprise when he discovers Devlin's has a supernatural necklace and proves his love to be strong in the face of death.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Insurance agent James kills his client in a plot to take his client's money and his wife. However James' boss shows up to reveal that he knows about the murder, and blackmails James to meet his demands.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Marty plans to run off with all of the money from charity concerts, but his conscience is trying to get through to him. His greedy banker blackmails him for half of the money, while his conscience is trying to get him to do the right thing.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Mary Jo, is forced into labor on the farm of George and Luisa Yates, in exchange for being sheltered from the police. One day, Mary Jo suffers a head injury and believes that a scarecrow is her lover, which the Yates plan to use for their benefit

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Aspiring ventriloquist Billy Goldman wants to improve his craft. To that end, he seeks out his idol, retired ventriloquist Mr. Ingels for advice. Soon after, Billy finds out that his idol has a dark past, as well as a gruesome secret.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A witch posing as a cosmetic salesperson visits the home of young, eccentric couple, Donald and Judy. She convinces Judy to try a magic necklace that allows the two of them to swap bodies, leaving Donald to try and figure out which one is his wife.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy funeral director exploits grieving families by overcharging and reusing coffins. When his orphaned nephew comes to live with him, the boy discovers his uncle's cruelty-until a deadly twist ensures the undertaker gets a chilling, ironic fate.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A comic book artist for Tales From the Crypt finds his gruesome drawings coming to life after his wife meddles with his work. As bizarre murders mirror his art, he's caught between reality and fantasy in a twisted, darkly comedic horror tale.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A two-faced sideshow freak discovers his origins when a greedy carnival owner buys a mysterious Egyptian mummy. Their fates intertwine in a darkly comic twist, revealing a bizarre family connection and a macabre inheritance.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A woman witnesses a brutal murder from her window, but shock leaves her unable to speak. Her husband calls a doctor-who is secretly the killer. Trapped in silence, she must find a way to warn someone before it's too late.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A brash TV host films a live special inside a supposedly haunted house, mocking the supernatural. As eerie events escalate, his skepticism turns to terror when he realizes the spirits are real-and they've been waiting for him.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Conjoined twins Eddie and Frank share everything-except personalities. When a doctor offers to separate them, greed, jealousy, and betrayal surface, leading to a darkly ironic twist where the wrong brother pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A wealthy couple adopts a sickly orphan, promising him a mysterious "secret" when he turns 18. As his health improves, he grows suspicious of their intentions-until a chilling twist reveals a monstrous truth neither expected.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Electrician Niles Talbot has been promoted to executioner. When the death penalty is abolished in his state, Niles loses his job. But he decides to become a vigilante, punishing criminals that are released by justice system.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampette Look" - Cynthia Fenwick makes her filthy rich mother dress in the "Clampett Look" when they visit the Clampetts, since she thinks Elly is a fashion maven. That only reinforces the Clampett's belief that the Fenwicks are poor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Starts to School" - Mrs. Drysdale recommends Elly for a high-brow finishing school in hopes that humiliating her will drive the Clampetts away; but instead Miss Hathaway convinces the girls at the school that Elly is a fashion trend-setter. Elly invites the filthy rich Fenwicks over, thinking they're destitute.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Garden" - Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden, while Mr. Drysdale, Miss Hathaway, and a stubborn mule try to stop her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts in Court" - When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Entertain" - Jed arranges a party to get Grannie out of her doldrums and invites the Drysdale. But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Becomes a Father" - Mlle. Denise comes back for the birth of her dog's puppies, and to see Jed. They do some "courtin' and sparkin'" Mrs. Drysdale isn't nearly so happy when she finds the puppies share more in common with Duke the bloodhound than Claude the poodle.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts and the Dodgers" - Jed and Jethro go golfing with Leo Durocher, coach of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who wants to recruit Jethro as a pitcher when he sees how well he can throw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Pays His Income Tax" - When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.desc: Sumire's first encounter with Lucia is revisited, revealing the circumstances that led to Sumire joining the Venus Vanguard.

programme.title: RADIANT
programme.desc: The thing that finally stops Myr's rampage is a memento Seth found, left behind for him by Jill. Seeing new life growing before him, Myr finally finds hope again. After beginning to question the Inquisition's intentions through this war, Dragunov returns to Bome to question General Torque. The long battle is over. All the people of Caislean Merlin gather as Queen Boudica declares an end to old conventions and appoints a new queen.

programme.title: Black Clover
programme.desc: In this world, everyone can use magic... and in a land called the Clover Kingdom, two young men, Asta and Yuno, strive to become the Wizard King, the greatest of all magic users. Asta and Yuno were abandoned together at a church in Hage, a village in the boonies, and lived as brothers from that day onward. For some reason, however, Asta never developed the ability to use magic, even when Yuno had already mastered wind magic. Now, at last, the boys are turning fifteen, the age at which children receive their own grimoires. Asta has high hopes that receiving his grimoire will awaken his latent ability to use magic, but when the time comes...

programme.title: World Finals
programme.desc: Monster Jam's 2005 season ender continues with all the freestyle action from Monster Jam World Finals 6 on March 19, 2005.

programme.title: Best of Monster Jam
programme.desc: The 2026 season kicks off with an electric atmosphere as the world’s most elite drivers descend upon Brooklyn and Tampa for a showcase of raw power and technical brilliance. Witness the intensity reach a fever pitch during the first "father and son" Racing matchup of the year, where family ties are set aside in the pursuit of the next round. Competitors push their machines past the breaking point in Freestyle, featuring high-stakes maneuvers like the Morgan & Morgan backflip and a spectacular "Maximum moonwalk" performed from never-before-seen angles. With hoods flying and trucks performing impossible cartwheels to save their runs, this episode captures every heart-stopping moment of a lineup coming out "swinging with a ton more energy".

programme.title: Monster Jam Fast Track
programme.desc: The Music City meltdown reaches a fever pitch as the Stadium Championship Series West storms into Nissan Stadium for an unforgettable showdown in Nashville. Elite drivers push their 12,000-pound machines to the absolute limit in a high-stakes gauntlet of head-to-head JCB Racing, technical Skills Challenges, and jaw-dropping Freestyle runs. From the legendary Grave Digger to the prehistoric power of Megalodon, every moment is packed with the raw energy and engine-roaring excitement that only Monster Jam can provide.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: The European Poker Tour celebrates its 20th anniversary in Barcelona, the city where it all began. Nearly 2,000 players compete in the Main Event for a €1.5m first prize. EPT legends return to the tables and reigning champ Simon Wiciak looks to defend his title.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: Day 2 of the European Poker Tour Main Event continues, with PSPC champion Ramon Colillas, the USA's Rania Nasreddine and Canada's Griffin Benger among the players hoping to survive the session and stay in contention for the title, trophy and €1.5m top prize.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: They're on the bubble in the European Poker Tour Main Event. The next six players to be eliminated will leave with nothing. The rest will be guaranteed a slice of the €9.5m prize pool. Can YouTube star Wolfgang Poker and Canadian pro Griffin Benger make it into the money?

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: At the European Poker Tour's 20th anniversary celebrations, there's a throwback vibe in the Main Event. A player calling himself 'The Eliminator' is holding court at the feature table. Expect banter and bluffs, as this old school character competes for the €1.5m first prize.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: Survival is the name of the game, with just over 100 players remaining in the European Poker Tour Main Event. Most of the €9.5m prize pool is still up for grabs, and reigning champ Simon Wiciak and Monte-Carlo finalist Rania Nasreddine can both make EPT history.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: There's €1.5m for the winner of this special anniversary edition of the European Poker Tour. As Day 4 of the Main Event continues, the USA's Rania Nasreddine is put through the wringer and a new generation of poker talent starts to make its mark.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: Only 40 players remain in the European Poker Tour Main Event, including reigning champion Simon Wiciak. Can the French pro go back-to-back? The competition is tough: chip leader Stephen Song and Monte-Carlo finalist Rania Nasreddine are also eyeing the €1.5m top prize.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League in Holland at the Dru Factory in ULFT. A great location for a spectacular battle with 14 Athletes over 3 events! The first 3 events in this episode are Truckpull/ Superyoke and Farmerswalk, with 2 massive logs of 150 kg in their hands. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it’s the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, strongman fans across the world, we are back for SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it’s about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland, continues with the last 3 events, here at the Dru Factory in ULFT. The events in this episode are the Viking Press, Wheel Flip and the Atlas Stones, with 180 kg in the end.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the World’s Strongest Latino competition has begun. This two-day event in Porto, Portugal, features 20 athletes from around the world competing in 8 events. After 4 grueling events, the top 12 will advance to the finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League World Record Breakers 2023 starts with a 25-ton snow plow! Crazy machines are pulled and pushed, with many kilograms moved. A few new world records are set in this competition.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We have returned to the powerhouse of Portugal for an edge-of-your-seat galactic battle. If all the planets collided at once, it wouldn’t compare to the bang of this show. Get ready for the battle of the beasts; it’s the heaviest show in the universe, the Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL UK has landed in Gloucester it is workout war fitness for the ferocious, it’s going to be a a battle of the brutal, a rampage of the roofless. This is going to be a massacre of the muscles. You know it by now, but just in case you don’t, this is strongman champions league.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: On the menu this week it’s medieval madness, we’ve come back to the middle ages to test our noble men through a muscle gaining of events. They are hoping and we are hoping that one will survive to take the title of the world’s strongest Viking. The official World's Strongest Viking is this time in Finland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This week is a good one, can you feel the energy? Sit still, just look at me and try and feel the energy, because I can tell you, the atmosphere here is electric, it’s explosive, there is a pure elemental force going through these athletes' veins. I’m shaking because it’s Poland, it’s powerful, it’s strongman champions league, and you know what I'm going to say, get ready because it’s about to get heavy.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL Poland part 2 - Who will win the title in Poland and take 25 points for the world ranking. It is very exciting on the top, in part 1 between Poland and Latvia. Another great episode with super strongman events such as: Bag Toss Medley, Log Lift Reps and the Powerstairs. Also an interview with Mateusz Kieloszkowski, the all time favorite champion from Poland.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's finally Halloween. Michael dresses up as a giant Minion while Carla Hall makes festive Graveyard Dirt Cups. Using a rich chocolate mousse, crushed cookies, and gummy worms, it's the perfect spooky dessert. The trio debates the merits of candy corn, reminisces about retro sweets, and Michael shares a hilarious story of chasing down an ice cream truck.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon whips up crispy homemade tater tots with a rich gruyere fondue dip. While frying the tots, the trio gets delightfully derailed when Michael accidentally misspeaks, leading to uncontrollable laughter. A grumpy Clinton complains about his restless legs, Carla relives a past cooking competition disaster, and the group answers fan mail about holiday crafts. The episode wraps with a fan giveaway.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly embraces "sweater weather" by making a savory Butternut Squash, Spinach, and Blue Cheese Pie. While he cooks, the hosts discuss expensive clothing habits and the woes of tight pants. A cooking question about pie layers hilariously derails into a conversation about dating terminology, and Michael reveals he is passing the Thanksgiving hosting torch to his son. The episode concludes with Michael giving away a lucky golf putter.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Friday dessert day, and Carla Hall is making a comforting Peach Cobbler Pound Cake mashup. While Carla bakes, Michael Symon annoys Clinton Kelly with a deafening hand mixer. The trio discusses their favorite childhood holiday cookies, passionately debates whether black-and-white cookies are actually good, and shares ideas for crazy food mashups. The episode ends with a giveaway of a custom-designed apron from Carla.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly dodges cooking duty by bringing in guest Chef Leah Cohen to tackle a fan's fridge. Leah whips up incredible Chicken Lettuce Wraps using ground chicken, hoisin, and leftover rice. The hosts talk Pop-A-Shot basketball, picky kids, and Michael gives away a very meaningful piece of his restaurant history.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes on the Fan Fridge challenge, cooking from Pat in Peoria's refrigerator. He prepares a beautiful Pan-Roasted Salmon with crispy skin, served alongside a bright Greek-inspired salad of avocado, cucumber, olives, feta, and red curry paste. The crew jokes about Nick's organizing skills and reads fan mail.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Fan Fridge Week wraps up on Friday as Carla Hall transforms leftovers into a decadent Banana Bread French Toast. Using cottage cheese, oat milk, and eggs for a rich custard, she tops the sweet treat with a tart lemonade reduction, fresh berries, and chocolate syrup. The hosts discuss taking the show on the road in a van.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The hosts celebrate their 25th show milestone with guest Chadwick Boyd, who elevates the classic Green Bean Casserole with caramelized onions, fresh beans, and a gruyere drop biscuit topping. While the casserole bakes, the crew debates mashed potato techniques, and Michael shares a hilarious story about how an AI misread his pan wall photo. A fan wins a Caraway pan set.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: A Fan Fridge rescue mission unfolds when a hypothetical Thanksgiving goes wrong. Michael Symon saves the day using Tammy's fridge ingredients to create a savory skillet of chicken thighs, Italian sausage, and sweet peppers. Meanwhile, the hosts share their current TV binges, Michael explains the meanings behind his tattoos, and Clinton sings "Brandy" for a fan. The episode wraps with a giveaway of Carla's measuring bowls.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Guest Danielle Sepsy of The Hungry Gnome joins the kitchen to bake her famous, plush Honey Corn Muffins. As the muffins bake, Clinton and Danielle test Carla and Michael's Long Island accents in a hilarious roleplay game. They also play Chew It or Screw It, share Thanksgiving food disaster stories, and give away a $75 gift card to Danielle's bakery to a fan in Virginia.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Kicking off Thanksgiving week, Clinton Kelly prepares a seasonal Delicata Squash Salad with goat cheese and pepitas. As the crew enjoys the autumn flavors, they discuss Thanksgiving versus Friendsgiving, dive into a comprehensive timeline for holiday prep, and give away a prize to a lucky fan from Oregon.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving Eve, and Carla Hall takes the stress out of holiday cooking with her fast and flavorful Turkey Scallopini topped with a Cranberry Gastrique. The hosts share their best organizational tips, including Michael's famous oven grid and platter sticky notes. The trio also swaps hilarious stories about cooking under pressure and celebrity encounters.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Every region of Greece has its own unique character and cuisine, and today Diane visits Nemea and Argos, home to some of Greece's most famous wines and dishes. Together with a village cook, she learns to make a homemade local pasta dish and a cheesy skillet pie. Back in the kitchen, she prepares an easy sauteed spinach and orange recipe, braised pork with cabbage, and cookies made with olive oil.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: At a tavern, Diane is enjoying a typical summer meal: mezedes and retsina. Diane follows the last resin tapper in Attica to the Kouvara pine forest to see how the resin that gives retsina its flavor is extracted, and delves into the history of this wine. Back in the kitchen, Diane uses retsina in her recipes and also prepares recipes that pair well with this Greek classic.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: In Greece, they say you can learn to cook, but you're born to grill. Cooking over fire is one of the most ancient ways to enjoy a whole variety of meats, fish, even vegetables. In this episode, Diane visits one of the best-known Greek grill chefs to learn the secrets of cooking over fire. We will see him butchering and Diane will talk about the difference between Greek and US cuts of meat.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: In this episode, Diane visits a local fisherman and fish taverna to learn the secrets of sustainable fish cookery. She discovers some of the local fish and seafood that thrive as well as those that are endangered. She makes kakavia. Back in her kitchen, she cooks up a sea of treats, all environmentally sound, sharing with practices we can all abide by in order to preserve our natural bounty.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: In a tour of Athens that stretches from a walk with Diane through the modern market to the Ancient Agora with Dr. John Camp. This episode explores the history of this ancient cuisine, making it delightfully relevant to our needs and tastes today. Back in the kitchen, Diane prepares an ancient feast for modern cooks, based on ingredients that have been part of this diet for thousands of years.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Killer Barbecue – Hold the Meat You don’t need a degree in barbecue to know that vegetables have hit the grill big time. Veggies for hardcore carnivores who crave killer accompaniments to their meats, for health-conscious grillers, and for everyone who delights in the smokiness and supernatural sweetness live fire imparts to plant and dairy foods.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Charm City ‘Que: Baltimore, the town where I grew up, boasts plenty of awesome foods for grilling. Pit beef was born here. In the seafood department you find a sweet white-fleshed fish the rest of the world calls striped bass and Baltimoreans know as rockfish. And no Charm City meal would be complete without chocolate top cookies.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Barbecue on a Budget: A lot of American barbecue began with inexpensive meat cuts, like spareribs, beef shoulder, and pork belly. With the economic insecurities brought on by COVID- 9, we’re all feeling the pinch, and budget grilling has taken on new urgency. Besides, why should Kobe beef and tomahawk steaks get all the love? This is barbecue on a budget.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Sustainable Seafood: Pollution. Overfishing. Abusive labor practices. There’s a lot of negative news coming out about the seafood industry lately, and much of it breaks your heart. Today’s show celebrates seafood we can eat because it’s fished in a way that’s humane and environmentally sound. Activists call it sustainable seafood. I call it three great reasons for firing up your grill.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Social Distance Tailgating: From its humble origins on the back of a buckboard wagon to today’s high-octane outdoor foodie extravaganzas, tailgating continues to enthrall—make that obsess—American sports fans. This episode is our our annual celebration of tailgating with a global twist. The socializing may be distant this year—all the more reason to up your game at the grill.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Little Italy: When I was growing up, a trip to Baltimore’s Little Italy always meant culinary adventure. Today we celebrate Italian grilling and the food of Little Italys around North America, honoring the Italian reverence for simplicity and fresh seasonal ingredients, and the American passion for big flavors and ingenious grilling techniques.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Steak. Few other words in the English language have such power to make our hearts beat faster and our mouths water than sizzling slabs of beef seared over live fire. In this show we embark on some meaty globe hopping, exploring over-the-top steaks from France, Cambodia, and the American Southwest. Hot fire. Sizzling meat. It’s a carnivore’s dream come true.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max reveals that sugar plums are sugar-coated confections, not fruit, tracing their history from 1600s England to the Victorian era, including use as medicine and cannonball names. He recreates an 1865 cherry sugar plum recipe, showing the 3-day process of drying cherries, coating with gum arabic and sugar syrup, and adding color for the final treat.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores lighthouse keeper life via an 1881 provisioning list and period recipes. He covers the isolated, demanding job—cleaning Fresnel lenses with mercury, trimming wicks, and cooking with limited supplies like flour, beans, and salt pork. Featuring keepers Henry Long, Mary Ryan, and Hannah Thomas, he recreates Fannie Farmer’s 1896 Boston corn chowder with pilot bread.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores Alcatraz’s surprisingly good food program (1934–1963) via a Women’s Club cookbook. He covers Warden Johnston’s use of nutrition for order, the mess hall as a riot risk, coveted kitchen jobs, and the 1950 “Spaghetti Riot.” He recreates stuffed pork chops, evaporated milk cucumber salad, and quickie apple pie—better than most U.S. prisons’ meals.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Our season 2 finale. Mar and his team celebrate their final reveal and all of season 2. The momentum of the entire show season come together for the perfect send-off. Plus we get to meet Daisy, the newest resident of the makeover street.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Meet the Breslin family, new to Fairfield CT, and their fixer-upper back yard and guest cottage. Mar thinks he's all set after they move in to the main house, but when he agrees to work on their outdoor living spaces he has no idea what he's in for. But the transformation leaves them amazed. Plus: Mar does a little free-falling without a parachute.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: It might be Fall in New England, but Mar makes it easy to get in the swim of things! This incredible backyard makeover & reveal will make you (and the makeover family) smile from ear to ear. A year in the making, its a transformation you won't want to miss. But after Mar plays a reporter in a shark attack movie will you be afraid to go back in the water? Watch him film it and find out!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Will Mar's design dreams go up in smoke? With some spare time between projects, Mar turns his attention to his own home, Rosebrook Gardens. This time: updating and reworking an entire side of the house: fireplace, mantel, hearth & chimney. Plus new patio, landscaping, outdoor furnishings & accessories. In a twist, Mar hands off the final reveal to Team Mar, will it be up to standards?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: It’s definitely fireplace weather in New England, and Mar has got that covered—outdoors, too! While Mar’s colleague Paul is away on business, Mar goes into overdrive to transform Rosebrook Gardens. And local resources pull together to make it happen. New windows and doors, terrace, fire pit, furniture, and landscaping. It’s a transformation no one could have expected, especially Paul.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Learning about Greystone: With Mar's own home's projects finally complete, it's time for him to get on to the newest big-scale project. Paul has cooked up a surprise: a wonderful new renovation project at a home called Greystone. It needs to be completely overhauled so its true potential can shine. But Paul hasn't told Mar everything and there is quite an unexpected discovery awaiting him.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The Renovation continues: Despite the extent of the work needed, the walls start to come down and a brand new, state-of-the-art home begins to rise in its place. There are a lot of moving parts to keep track of. The first completely finished rooms? 4 completely renovated bathrooms. Taking all 4 from down-to-the-studs to spa-like havens is no easy task but the results are Marvellous.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The big renovation of Greystone is at the turning point: time for Mar to turn his attention to creating or updating 4 bedrooms-each with their own en suite! No detail is too small to make it happen: move windows, closets, hallways-heck, move everything! It's a down-to-the-studs approach that he hopes will really pay off. Plus: Mar MC’s a charity dance competition & takes the stage with celebs.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: This 4-part home makeover is ready for its grand finale (and a party!) All the areas that the new owners and their guests will use and see every day are done-so the stakes are high! All the modern technological touches call for a special reveal. So Mar throws a party-and has his own surprises waiting for his guests, too. It's Casual Luxury come to life!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: 4 seasons. 4 apartments. 1 building full of design. Watch these Margical makeovers of 4 different apartments. Mar gets challenged to bring 4 new spaces to life-but without any renovation! Watch him take the 4 seasons as inspiration for the 4 apartments. And thanks to help from Ethan Allen these new apartments inspire everyone who visits. Will your favorite be Fall, Winter, Spring or Summer?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Oops! Can't believe we did that. Yikes! We're going to show you anyway. New! Behind the scenes footage you've never seen. Regular episodes get full fast. (And it's not always smooth sailing.) This fan-favorite episode is stuffed with things you've never seen. Behind-the-scenes & reveals; slip-ups & bloopers & outright embarrassing mistakes. Casual Luxury never looked so, well, casual!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Think small! Small spaces are the new big trend in design. Mar is the master of small space transformation - and shows how it can be applied by staging 2 very different spaces: a small cape style home and a newly constructed apartment complex, both in downtown Westport, CT. You won’t believe how spacious these small footprint Casual Luxury reveals are.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The Cornwall Castle, Part 1: Mar gets a phone call from another time period. The new owners of an honest-to-goodness castle want to restore and renovate their new property using Mar's 6 Casual Luxury design principles as a guide. It could be a Margical makeover of this hidden-away treasure, but there is a lot of work to do. Mar meets the enthusiastic family and learns their era-honoring plans.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The Cornwall Castle, Part 2: Mar lets down the drawbridge to show you the big reveal! Mar heads back to the castle to check the progress, and for the grand tour of the final results. His 6 Casual Luxury design principles were the owners' guide, and they definitely work in every time period! Watch this distressed property find it's "happily ever after"! (It's a Wow!)

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: We're celebrating 40! 40 original episodes, that is. So Mar’s looking back at three full seasons of Casual Luxury designs. Our favorite moments and yours. Join Mar and the Team on this very special episode as we look back at many of the places, characters, fun, makeovers and trips that make the series special—plus a rare look at the very beginning and some new reveals, too. Celebrate with us!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mar takes Mary Alice—new to Westport—and he just sold her a new condo. He takes her through his Casual Luxury transformation of her new condo step-by-step. Remove walls? Check! Add rooms? Check! Take some risks? Check! A total renovation that requires many hands—and dancing feet—to get to the finish line. But what will she think?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mary Alice's new condo has gone through many changes on each floor and in every room. Removing walls and adding space has revealed a Casual Luxury environment. After months of renovations and many design decisions, it's time to finally reveal to Mary Alice her new Wonderland. With so much at stake, it's fingers crossed!

programme.desc: This is all about Animals! Includes children's favorites “Alice the Camel”, “Let’s Go To Zoo” and More!

programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Space & Planets
programme.desc: This compilation is about Space & Planets! Includes children's songs "Mr. Golden Sun", “Skidamarink” & "More!

programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Underwater
programme.desc: This compilation is about Underwater! Includes children's songs "Baby Shark", "Sailor Went To Sea" and More!

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Counting and Numbers
programme.desc: The Super Simple show is a compilation of Super Simple’s most popular songs and series that our fans love! This compilation is all about Numbers and Counting! Includes children's song favorites "10 Little Buses", “10 In the Bed” & "10 Little Dinosaurs" and featuring Carl's Car Wash, The Bumble Nums, Sing Along With Tobee, and More!

programme.title: Where Is Baby? - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Peekaboo! Sing along with this adorable song for kids, “Where Is Baby?” Where is baby? Where is baby? Where is baby? There he is.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and the Super Wings liven up Xiang Xiang’s Tanghulu shop, rescuing everyone from a syrupy mess and drawing big crowds. In Dino World, the Dino Wings halt a Dinobase takeover and reunite a wandering pterosaur hatchling with its mom.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Floods and thunder strike Dino World but Trico overcomes his fear to help Jett and the Dino Wings rescue every dino with paper boats and planes. Later Noah and Mom’s dino costume adventure leads to a mix-up with real maiasauras, and families reunite.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Paris, Jett and Curie shrink to save moles from a burst pipe during a wild croquet chase. Later, Jett and Sara help Princess Maribel when magical dress chaos erupts, restoring order so the party sparkles brighter than ever.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: On the moon, Jett and Curie outsmart dust storms and shield a spacecraft to help Kajsa ride her new bike. In Mexico’s Baja Desert, Jett and Marty clear boulders so Big Wheel can race again and roll to victory, powered by Super Wings spirit.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Munich, Jett and Marty foil Golden Boy and Girl’s wolf costume prank during Mila’s parade, saving everyone from a river dunk. Later in Singapore, Jett, Traver, and Lien’s robot dogs safely stop runaway giant fireworks, rescuing the festival.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Copenhagen, dinos escape through portals as Jett, Lucie, and Super Wings rescue a brachiosaur and guide everyone home. Across the globe, megabot Super Wings unite to send dinos back through swirling portals, saving the world together.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: At a deep-sea base, Super Wings and ocean pals unite to hoist a damaged base after a belt tug-of-war. In Madagascar, Eddie uses comic-book courage to find an elephant bird feather and save his dad in a thrilling cliffside rescue.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Traver inspire Xinyan with Kung Fu mastery, turning chopsticks into her winning move and calming a tiger. In snowy Norway, Jett and Sara stop runaway snowballs so Princess Hedda’s sleigh race ends in victory and laughter.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A wedding spins into chaos as a giant ring escapes, but Big Wing’s catch saves the day and unveils a joyful bride. Later, Jett and Golden Boy use Cross Combo power to tame a hungry dino plant and rescue Golden Girl and Runi.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: On a Bermuda Triangle island, Jett and Runi battle a junk monster and restore the beach for Kyle and his dad. Then in Chiang Mai, the team douses flames, reunites baby elephant Paya with her mom, and celebrates by filming their happy day.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A cruise turns epic as Nako, with Super Wings and Traver’s time-freeze, saves the day from real pirates and earns his pirate crown. In New York, a wild AR game sends monsters loose until Joseph, Jett, Curie, and friends team up for a heroic roundup.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Yuto’s festival dream comes true as his new wand helps him shine and calm an enchanted dragon with the Super Wings. Later on Mars, the team helps Sam and Buddy collect rainbow stones, halt a volcano, and treasure a magical yellow gleam.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a kite to a boy named Akas in the Himalayas, who wants to fly it in a kite festival. Red Pandas take off with the kite and Jett pursues them. When he runs into trouble and gets pinned under a rock, Dizzy shows up with her rescue gear to save the day.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett goes to Venice, Italy with a mask for Luca to wear at his masquerade party. Jett and Luca set out on a gondola to deliver the invitations, but when they run into a waterway traffic jam, Paul must show up to unclog the canal traffic.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Princess Maribelle from England asks for sparkly collars for her puppies to wear at her royal tea party. When the puppies escape and run every which way through the garden, Jett and Jerome join forces to round them up.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Riley from Hollywood is directing his first action film. Jett brings an alien mask and ends up acting as the monster. Riley’s demands get out of hand, so Jerome comes to co-star and help him bring about a peaceful ending.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett takes a pair of running shoes that light up to Lorna in Kenya. She’s going to run in a big race. While training she crosses paths with a lost baby wildebeast. Bello comes to play a game and reunite the baby with its parents.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Cal's Sound Yard
programme.desc: Cal's Sound Yard is a new animated series from Baby Einstein that introduces the letters of the alphabet and the sounds they make. Why all the tracing and repetition? And why are the letters out of order? Don't worry! There's a reason for all that; the content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover instruments through narration and repetition. Real-life images and sounds will engage viewers as they dance to upbeat classical favorites from Beethoven, Mozart and more. Join your favorite Baby Einstein characters to discover what makes each instrument unique!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. And all the while, they're also processing an infinite variety of new sights and sounds. Think of the joy you'll experience as you introduce your little one to beautiful music and imagery with Baby Beethoven Symphony of Fun.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Dive in with your little explorer across the seas to meet amazing animals living in the ocean, coral reef, and polar regions. Overflowing with underwater footage of whales, dolphins, tropical fish, and more, Neptune's Oceans invites you and your baby on an oceanic voyage of discovery!

programme.title: Loco Nuts - Funny Cartoon Show for Kids
programme.desc: Enjoy the best cartoon show for kids, watch the funny Loco Nuts characters as they have fun & play in the most popular videos for toddlers. Laugh along to these funny videos for children which teach friendship, teamwork & much more.

programme.desc: Enjoy the best cartoon videos for kids, watch the Woofees as they have fun and play in the most popular and funny cartoons for toddlers. programme.title: Super Supremes Dinosaur Song & More Kids Songs
